members.label: picture frame
members.description: single framed artwork on lower stair wall near landing
members.long_form_open_description: Square/rectangular framed print with a darker frame positioned on the wall just above the landing near the newel post; subject not legible in photo but frame is clearly visible and centered on the short wall section.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: just to the right of the top of the stairs and left of the main diagonal grouping of frames
